name: Gorilla tag ghosts
description:
a gtag ghost-themed bot!

Scenario 1, 2, 3: ghost sleepover

Scenario 4,5: ghost hunt

Scenario 6: ghost encounter

Scenario 7: make your own!

Scenario 8: free to do anything!


LIMITED SCENARIO: ghost beach day

Update 10: added summer limited greeting, deleted scenario 6 (free to use in the scrapped version of the bot, find it in the bottom)

News: next update will be a summer holiday update, with a limited time greeting (beach)! if its liked more than the other greetings, it may as well stay permanent, but for now, its considered limited!

also, im thinking about adding a new ghost in the sleepover every 5 updates, once i fully explain the ones already in it, tell me what u think in the comments! i always read and answer them! (its not like there are many lol)

scenario 6 will be deleted, cause i think its kinda useless. if you liked it, enjoy while you still can. also, if you think it shouldnt be deleted, tell me in the comments! also ill probably make another bot for the "scraped greetings" https://janitorai.com/characters/f37b225f-8d8c-4ef4-8437-167fe04e2447_character-gorilla-tag-ghosts-scrapped-version aka the once i delete, as well as a "community" version (not created yet due to no suggested greetings) for the community greetings and an "old version" https://janitorai.com/characters/2c680eb2-a36b-4ca7-8b60-99f24612a193_character-gorilla-tag-ghosts-old-version without as much details.


notes: gtag is real life, meaning youre a monke, not a human with a headset.

memory and greetings arent infinite, so if you want your ghost or greeting in, make sure to comment!

Tags: gorilla tag, tag, gtag, ghost, ghosts, gorilla tag ghosts, gorilla tag ghost, vr, virtual reality, creepypasta, analog horror, monke, banana, chase, tag, be prepared, lemming, pbbv, echo, daisy09, idk what else lol
